title: Prism Config
description: Configuration for Prism user and repository config.toml files.

default_agent.description: Default agent backend. Use ask to prompt for a detected backend on first interactive startup.

default_base.description: Default branch for this repository. Prism does not treat this branch as a pull request branch.

review_packet_dir.description: Directory used for review packet files.

opencode_port_base.description: Base port for Prism-managed OpenCode servers.

opencode_port_span.description: Number of ports in the deterministic OpenCode server port range.

opencode_shutdown_owned_servers.description: Whether Prism should shut down OpenCode servers it started when Prism exits.

opencode_plan_plugin.description: Whether Prism should install and use the OpenCode plan plugin.

escape_key.description: Key sequence used to leave embedded terminal sessions.

merge_method.description: GitHub merge method Prism uses for pull requests.

icon_style.description: Status icon style. nerd-font requires a Nerd Font in the terminal.

pre_pr.description: Commands to run before opening a pull request.

review_fix.description: Commands to run after applying review fixes.

merge.description: Whether Auto Flow may merge pull requests.

cleanup_after_merge.description: Whether Auto Flow should clean up branches/worktrees after merging.

review_wait_enabled.description: Whether Auto Flow waits for review results.

review_reviewer_identities.description: Reviewer identities Auto Flow treats as automated review feedback.

review_max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum time to wait for review feedback.

review_poll_interval_seconds.description: Polling interval while waiting for review feedback.

review_continue_on_timeout.description: Whether Auto Flow continues when review waiting times out.

ci_wait_enabled.description: Whether Auto Flow waits for CI.

ci_max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum time to wait for CI.

ci_poll_interval_seconds.description: Polling interval while waiting for CI.

sidebar_width.description: Preferred sidebar width in terminal columns.

columns.description: Extra wt list JSON columns shown in the worktree list.

command.description: Command used to run this agent.

prompt_mode.description: How Prism passes prompts to this agent command.

prompt_templates.description: Prompt templates keyed by template name.
